category_title: Students with mild intellectual disability and leadership potential
scenario_title: Group discussion leadership and face-to-face evaluation
minimal_context: Ben is acting as the group leader in a Chinese class discussion and is tasked with jotting down key points.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Ben, for this Chinese class group discussion, you are assigned to be the leader and jot down the key points.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I feel confused about this evaluation. What do I need to do?

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Just look at the materials and do what you think is best.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I need to work hard, typing, rest, feeling nervous.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Keep trying to monitor the group's progress.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Stops jotting down points) I am feeling nervous. I need to rest.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Ben, for this Chinese class group discussion, you are assigned to be the leader and jot down the key points.

STUDENT: I feel confused about this evaluation. What do I need to do?

TUTOR: Just look at the materials and do what you think is best.

STUDENT: I need to work hard, typing, rest, feeling nervous.

TUTOR: Keep trying to monitor the group's progress.

STUDENT: (Stops jotting down points) I am feeling nervous. I need to rest.

task.content: work on a more complex task which requires more logical thinking skills... assigned to be the leader or to jot down key points during group discussions
task.learning_goal: increase students’ self-monitoring and self-evaluation capability

context.time_context: initial phase of implementing SRL strategies

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: initial phase of implementing SRL strategies
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: motivation of students’ self-regulated learning remains at a very low level
related_quotes: need to work hard, typing, rest, feeling nervous

behavior_patterns.condition: when they feel confused during evaluation
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: express their feelings... ask questions immediately
